subcodes.first_line: Go forth, by God's command and decree, unto all regions, and remind them of that which was uttered before thy face, for I am the One Who remembreth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذهب بامر الله و حکمه الی الدیار و ذکرهم بما نطق امام وجهک و انا الذاکر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
